description: Infrastructure tasks — CI, cross-platform builds, sanitizers, release.

tasks.title: Add vulnerability scanning - static analysis (cppcheck/scan-build), fuzzing targets, buffer overflow checks in CI
Add arm64 release builds (Linux aarch64, Windows arm64) and multi-arch macOS universal image
tasks.description:
Mirror the 0xFX release matrix so 0xSYNTH ships arm64 alongside x64 on every platform, plus a universal macOS binary. Reference: ~/projects/0xFX/scripts/packaging/.

## Scope

1. **Linux arm64** — cross-compile via aarch64-linux-gnu toolchain when a sysroot is available, otherwise fall back to a podman+qemu-user container build. Produce `0xSYNTH-<ver>-linux-arm64.tar.gz` and `0xSYNTH-<ver>-aarch64.AppImage`.

2. **Windows arm64** — cross-compile via llvm-mingw (detect at `$LLVM_MINGW_PREFIX`, `/opt/llvm-mingw`, `~/tools/llvm-mingw-*`). Produce `0xSYNTH-<ver>-windows-arm64.zip` and `0xSYNTH-<ver>-windows-arm64-setup.exe` via a second NSIS script (`0xsynth_installer_arm64.nsi`) that targets the arm64 Program Files path.

3. **macOS universal** — already partially scaffolded: `package_macos.sh` doesn't exist yet for 0xSYNTH. Port the 0xFX version. Key bit: `-DCMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES="arm64;x86_64"` produces a universal `.app`/`.clap`/`.vst3`/`.component` in one build. Output `0xSYNTH-<ver>-macos-universal.dmg` and `.zip`.

4. **package_release.sh rewrite** — accept `--arch x64|arm64|all` (default `all`). Detect each toolchain up-front and skip gracefully with a warning rather than failing when one is missing. Model exactly on `~/projects/0xFX/scripts/packaging/package_release.sh` — same detect_llvm_mingw, HAVE_LINUX_ARM64_NATIVE vs HAVE_LINUX_ARM64_CONTAINER fallback, same populate_* helpers.

5. **CMake toolchain files** — `cmake/aarch64-linux-gnu.cmake` and `cmake/llvm-mingw-arm64.cmake`. Copy from 0xFX; audit for any 0x808-era paths that need rewriting to 0xSYNTH.

6. **Containerfile.linux-arm64** — Fedora aarch64 container with the 0xSYNTH build deps (SDL2-devel, mesa-libGL-devel, libX11-devel, etc.). Copy from 0xFX and verify no extra deps are needed (0xSYNTH uses miniaudio, not SDL2 for audio — check whether the container needs any 0xSYNTH-specific packages).

## Acceptance

- [ ] `./scripts/packaging/package_release.sh 1.2.0` produces 6 artifacts on a machine with all toolchains (linux-x64 tar+AppImage, linux-arm64 tar+AppImage, windows-x64 zip+exe, windows-arm64 zip+exe).
- [ ] `./scripts/packaging/package_release.sh 1.2.0 --arch arm64` builds only arm64 artifacts.
- [ ] Missing toolchain → warning + skip, never a hard failure.
- [ ] On macOS: `./scripts/packaging/package_macos.sh 1.2.0` produces a universal `.dmg` that runs on both Apple Silicon and Intel.
- [ ] `file build/0xsynth` on the universal macOS build reports `Mach-O universal binary with 2 architectures`.
- [ ] GitHub release page has all platform+arch artifacts attached.
